THEUNDERSTUDY-PLANNED.title: Planned
THEUNDERSTUDY-PLANNED.description: When a card becomes [gold]Planned[/gold], it also becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold]. Some cards can play all Planned cards in the order they were planned.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTENSE.title: Intense
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTENSE.description: Becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold] whenever played. Gain 1 additional Block and deal 1 additional damage for each Intense applied this combat.
THEUNDERSTUDY-STABLE.title: Stable
THEUNDERSTUDY-STABLE.description: May not be modified during combat.
